tasks.title: Publish weekly velocity report: tasks done, in-progress, blocked
tasks.description: Sam: scan the full task board, identify all done tasks this week, tasks still in_progress, and any stale/unassigned items. Publish a markdown velocity report to output/velocity_2026_04_01.md. Flag any tasks that look stuck.
